title: Mildly Spicy Thai Noodle Dish
description: This earthy and silky Thai noodle dish is a perfect hangover cure, featuring confit tomato and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. It is made with boiling water and a blend of spices.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium heat and add the sliced onion.
Cook the onion for 5 minutes or until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the turmeric and red pepper flakes and cook for 1 minute.
Add the confit tomato to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, skillet mixture, and vegetable broth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Store leftovers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
